data.content: Shipment completed against existing origin/main commit 32fd3e5f9ece, which already contains the Diagnostics scrollbar-gutter stabilization and the approved ReTakes width fix from aa1951bc. Verified remote GitHub Actions for main commit 32fd3e5f9ece are green (CI and Coverage Badge succeeded on 2026-03-31). Revalidated in /private/tmp/foolery-44f1-ship2.Cpwwlx with bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build; lint emitted the existing react-hooks/incompatible-library warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx but exited successfully. No new shipment commit was needed, and git push origin HEAD:main reported Everything up-to-date.
